_comment: Side feed for my own plugins. Same shape as upstream applicationFeed.json — U-Manager concatenates this onto the CA feed at fetch time.

applist.Name: UManager
applist.Author: jandrop
applist.Overview: Push notification agent for the U-Manager mobile app. Forwards Unraid notifications to your phone so you don't have to keep the web UI open.

RecommendedReason.en_US: Install this on your Unraid server to forward notifications to the U-Manager mobile app.
RecommendedReason.es_ES: Instala este plugin en el servidor para que U-Manager reciba las notificaciones.

applist.Name: U-Manager Companion
applist.Author: jandrop
applist.Overview: Monkey-patches Unraid's bundled GraphQL API at boot to expose extra data and write paths the U-Manager mobile app needs — installed-plugin manifest metadata, network device utilisation, Docker stats, parity-check resume, power mutations, share CRUD (create/edit/delete) and more. Required on the Unraid server for the app to show the full picture.

RecommendedReason.en_US: Required on the Unraid server for U-Manager to access plugin manifests, network metrics and Docker stats over GraphQL.
RecommendedReason.es_ES: Requerido en el servidor para que U-Manager acceda a los manifests de plugins, métricas de red y stats de Docker vía GraphQL.

applist.Name: U-Manager Browser
applist.Author: jandrop
applist.Overview: Native file browser for Unraid. Browse, upload, download, search, archives, hardlinks, trash, permissions, image and video thumbnails. Powers the file browsing feature in the U-Manager mobile app and runs standalone in any browser at port 8740.

RecommendedReason.en_US: Install on your Unraid server to use the file browser from the U-Manager mobile app. Also serves a standalone web UI on port 8740.
RecommendedReason.es_ES: Instálalo en el servidor para usar el explorador de archivos desde la app U-Manager. También expone una interfaz web independiente en el puerto 8740.

applist.Name: Plex Ripper Detector
applist.Author: jandrop
applist.Overview: Detects unauthorized ripping of a self-hosted Plex Media Server by tools like Reaparr and PlexRipper. Six independent signals derived from Reaparr's source: User-Agent, 403-then-download probe, parallel Range requests, downloads without /:/timeline, daemon file descriptors with no matching session, and generic HTTP-client UAs on /library/parts. Runs every minute and exposes a WebGUI tab under Tools > System Information with a live dashboard, plus Telegram and Discord alerts.

RecommendedReason.en_US: Catches Reaparr and PlexRipper hitting your server. Six detection signals derived from the ripper source code. Web dashboard, Telegram and Discord alerts. No port forwarding required.
RecommendedReason.es_ES: Detecta herramientas tipo Reaparr o PlexRipper que se descargan tus videos. Seis senales de deteccion basadas en el codigo fuente del ripper. Dashboard web y alertas Telegram y Discord. No requiere abrir puertos.
